scripts.android:reverse: adb reverse tcp:5000 tcp:5000 && adb reverse tcp:5174 tcp:5174
scripts.sync:live: cross-env CAPACITOR_LIVE_RELOAD=true CAPACITOR_SERVER_HOST=192.168.1.101 npx cap sync android
scripts.android:live: npm run android:reverse && npm run build:cap:local && npm run sync:live && npx cap run android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:reverse && npm run build:cap:local && npx cap run android
scripts.build:cap: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.build:cap:local: tsc -b && vite build --mode development && npx cap sync
scripts.build:cap:prod: tsc -b && vite build --mode production && npx cap sync
scripts.android:apk:local: npm run android:reverse && npm run build:cap:local && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:apk:prod: npm run build:cap:prod && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
